what_happened: Created a reusable workflow_call template for release metadata capture, extracted from deploy-production.yml
why: deploy-production.yml had an inline 'Capture Release Metadata' + 'Upload Release Metadata' step pair that is useful for all three repos; extracting it into a workflow_call template avoids duplication
fix_applied: Used workflow_call trigger with optional inputs; the version input falls back to git describe --tags --always via a shell conditional in the run step, because GitHub Actions expressions cannot use shell substitution directly in the input default field
pattern_to_remember: In reusable workflow templates (workflow_call), optional string inputs that need a computed default (e.g. git describe) cannot be expressed as a YAML default: — put the fallback logic in the shell step: if [ -n '${{ inputs.version }}' ]; then VERSION='${{ inputs.version }}'; else VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always); fi
